content.full_text:
NAPA COUNTY
OFFICE OF COUNTY COUNSEL

1195 THIRD STREET, ROOM 301 * NAPA, CALIFORNIA 94559-3001
AREA CODE 707/253-4521   FAX 707/253-4176

June 5, 1992

Our File No. 1186.200

ROBERT WESTMEYER, County Counsel

MARGARET L. WOODBURY, Chief Deputy
JOSEPH C. FOLKARD, Deputy
DAVID L. ZALTSMAN, Deputy
KEVIN C. STOBAUGH, Deputy
JAYNE HERMAN, Deputy

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Re: Campaign contributions and expenditures

Dear Sirs:

Members of the Napa County Board of Supervisors have asked me to research whether a local ordinance could be adopted restricting campaign contributions and expenditures for candidates running for local offices. Most of the issues would not involve your office. However, one might.

Certain members of the Board are interested in requiring the disclosure of the names and addresses of all persons making contributions in excess of $25 rather than the $100 limit provided by state law. If local officials have requested an opinion on this subject and your office has issued same, I would appreciate receiving copies.

Your review of this matter is very much appreciated.

Very truly yours,

[Signature]
ROBERT WESTMEYER
County Counsel

RW:plg
l\rw\misc\fppc.ltl]
